hook: I spent $89 on a pillow and my neck pain is gone.

aida_breakdown.attention: Person wakes up and immediately grabs their neck — instant universal recognition for side sleepers
aida_breakdown.interest: Years of morning stiffness, flat yellowed pillow never replaced, every DIY workaround failing
aida_breakdown.desire: Eli & Elm curved cutout cradles shoulder, adjustable fill dials in exact loft — first pain-free morning in years
aida_breakdown.action: Product shot on styled white bed with bio arrow

value_equation.dream_outcome: Wake up without neck pain every morning as a side sleeper
value_equation.perceived_likelihood: Curved cutout shown on camera solving the exact shoulder-gap problem — specific engineering, not vague comfort claims
value_equation.time_delay: First night — noticeable difference same morning
value_equation.effort_sacrifice: No chiropractor, no complicated setup — unbox, adjust fill once, sleep

scenes.visual_prompt: Person wakes up and immediately grabs the back of their neck, wincing. Morning light through bedroom window. Relatable and understated — not dramatized.
scenes.voiceover: I woke up with neck pain every single morning.

scenes.visual_prompt: Close-up of a flat, yellowed, completely compressed pillow. Looks like it has been used for 5+ years and never replaced. Just sad.
scenes.voiceover: I was sleeping on a flat pancake. For years.

scenes.visual_prompt: Person trying every workaround: stacking two pillows, rolling a towel and tucking it under neck, flipping pillow to the cold side. Nothing helps. Visible frustration.
scenes.voiceover: Stacked pillows. Rolled towels. Nothing worked.

scenes.visual_prompt: Eli & Elm pillow unboxed. Clear close-up of the curved cutout channel designed for shoulder clearance. Person traces the ergonomic curve with one finger, visibly curious.
scenes.voiceover: Curved cutout means your shoulder has somewhere to go.

scenes.visual_prompt: Hands unzipping the pillow cover, pulling out a small amount of fill, rezipping. Person tests loft by pressing down — looks deliberate. Customization feels satisfying.
scenes.voiceover: Adjust the fill until the loft feels right for you.

scenes.visual_prompt: Next morning: person wakes up slowly and stretches both arms — no neck grab. Looks genuinely surprised. Rolls shoulders experimentally. A small real smile. Not performative.
scenes.voiceover: First morning I woke up without grabbing my neck.

scenes.visual_prompt: Clean product shot of Eli & Elm pillow on a styled white bed with neutral linen. Arrow pointing upward. Link in bio overlay.

caption:
I spent $89 on a pillow and my neck pain is gone.

I woke up stiff every single morning for years. Tried stacking pillows, rolling towels under my neck, flipping to the cold side. Nothing fixed it.

My pillow was a flat, yellowed pancake I just kept not replacing.

The Eli & Elm side sleeper pillow has a curved cutout so your shoulder actually has somewhere to go. You adjust the fill until the loft is exactly right.

First morning after: no neck grab. I was skeptical. I was wrong.

$89 is the best sleep money I've ever spent.

Link in bio.

#sidesleeper #neckpainrelief #sleepbetter #pillowupgrade #springwellness2026 #adjustablepillow #sleepwellness

affiliate_strategy.primary_product: Eli & Elm side sleeper adjustable pillow
